person.name: Xue Aaron
person.label: Game Developer & Creative Technologist
person.headline: Game developer crafting emotional and interactive experiences across indie and commercial titles.
person.valueProp: From founding an indie studio to collaborating with partners like Google and Devsisters, I design and build games that connect emotion, creativity, and technology.
person.availability: Open to new collaborations and creative game projects (remote-friendly).

projects.title: Soul of Butterflies – Incubation
projects.summary: A narrative puzzle adventure independently developed, crowdfunded, exhibited, and commercially released.
projects.context: Led full-cycle development — concept, story, system design, music direction, localization, and crowdfunding management.
projects.problem: Create an immersive, story-driven indie game with limited team resources.
projects.approach: Handled all design and development tasks, coordinated art and sound collaborators, and managed promotion through crowdfunding.

outcome.details: Exhibited at gaming events and received positive player feedback.

assets.alt: Gameplay scene from Soul of Butterflies – Incubation

projects.title: Emotional Management – Interactive Game
projects.summary: An emotional-learning educational game for the U.S. market, built to support students' emotional regulation through interactive play.
projects.context: Collaborated with U.S. educational partners and development teams to prototype and deliver interactive modules.
projects.problem: Build a game that helps children identify and manage emotions effectively through play.
projects.approach: Developed Unity prototypes, designed core gameplay flows, and adjusted based on user testing.

outcome.metric: Completed and launched with smooth delivery
outcome.details: Helped refine gameplay to fit educational use and emotional learning objectives.

assets.alt: UI from Emotional Management interactive scenes

projects.title: Unity CI/CD Automation Pipeline
projects.summary: Developed a CI/CD automation pipeline for Unity builds using Fastlane, integrating Discord bot commands for remote control and TestFlight uploads.
projects.context: Built to streamline internal mobile game testing and deployment workflows for the development team.
projects.problem: Manual Unity build and deployment to TestFlight was time-consuming and error-prone, slowing iteration speed.
projects.approach: Implemented Fastlane scripts for build automation, set up Unity Cloud build steps, and connected a custom Discord bot to trigger remote builds and uploads via API.

outcome.details: Enabled remote-controlled builds directly from Discord, increasing iteration efficiency for QA and design teams.

assets.alt: Discord bot interface controlling Unity builds

projects.title: Wacky Boat (CookieRun IP – Outsourcing Project)
projects.summary: A fast-paced mobile action game based on the CookieRun IP, built collaboratively with Devsisters.
projects.context: Handled production management, game design, and real-time system implementation.
projects.problem: Deliver high-quality gameplay that fits the CookieRun IP and commercial timelines.
projects.approach: Coordinated with client teams, managed schedules, and developed gameplay mechanics in Unity.

outcome.metric: Successfully delivered project milestones to Devsisters
outcome.details: Contributed to key gameplay systems and ensured stable, optimized performance.

projects.title: Tarowl: Pocket Tarot
projects.summary: An AI-powered tarot reading app built with Flutter and TypeScript backend using Google Cloud Platform.
projects.context: Developed end-to-end mobile experience — UI, AI tarot reading logic, and backend integration.
projects.problem: Create a personalized, intuitive mobile tarot reading experience with AI support.
projects.approach: Built full-stack solution using Flutter and GCP services, focused on accessible UI/UX.

outcome.metric: Released to app store and iterated via user feedback

experience.description: Leading game planning, Unity development support, and project progress management for multiple commercial titles.
Developed and released the indie game 'Soul of Butterflies – Incubation' through crowdfunding and event exhibitions.
Organized and hosted events, including Google's Machine Learning Course, and managed cross-disciplinary collaborations among students.

services.name: Game Design & Prototyping
services.scope: Concept design, gameplay mechanics, flowcharts, and prototyping in Unity.
services.notes: Ideal for teams exploring early-stage ideas or validating mechanics.

services.name: Game Production & Project Management
services.scope: Scheduling, milestone tracking, and communication between art, design, and engineering.
services.notes: Focused on ensuring delivery quality and timeline alignment.
